concerns.text: T028: 'Implement paired Wilcoxon signed-rank test for pass@1 scores' — pass@1 is binary (pass/fail) data; Wilcoxon is for continuous metrics. plan.md Technical Context specifies McNemar's test for binary pass@1. Task is unexecutable as written due to spec contradiction.

T030: 'Implement Bonferroni correction for two hypotheses' — plan.md FR/SC Coverage Matrix explicitly states 'Bonferroni correction for 3 hypotheses' (accuracy, latency, token reduction). Task contradicts plan, implementer cannot determine correct count.

T031: 'Implement effect size calculation (Cohen's d)' — plan.md Technical Context specifies Wilcoxon tests which should use rank-biserial correlation, not Cohen's d (parametric effect size). Task is unexecutable due to spec contradiction.

T036: 'Implement power/sample-size justification in code/analyze.py' — plan.md FR/SC Coverage Matrix explicitly assigns FR-010 to 'Phase 0: research.md', not code. Task places work in wrong phase, implementer cannot execute correctly.

T001: 'Create project structure per implementation plan' — too coarse. Does not enumerate exact directories/files to create. Downstream atomizer will split this into individual directory/file creation tasks.
T041: 'Code cleanup and refactoring across all modules' — too vague. No concrete deliverable or verification criteria. Implementer cannot determine what cleanup/refactoring is required.
